design_philosophy.emotional_goal: Confidence in data, clarity in chaos.

usage_rules: Use Poppins ONLY for Headings (h1-h4) and major stats.
Use Inter for all body text, tables, inputs, and long-form content.
Use JetBrains Mono for code snippets, API keys, or raw data values.

layout.spacing_system: Use generous padding. p-6 or p-8 for cards. gap-6 for grids.
layout.grid_strategy: Bento Grid (Mode B - High Density). Use col-span-2 or col-span-full for major charts.

cards.classes: bg-card/50 backdrop-blur-sm border border-border/50 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300 shadow-none rounded-xl

buttons.primary: bg-primary hover:bg-primary/90 text-white shadow-lg shadow-primary/20 rounded-lg px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary hover:bg-secondary/90 text-white shadow-lg shadow-secondary/20 rounded-lg px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-transparent hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-lg px-6 py-2 transition-all

inputs.style: bg-background/50 border-input focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-lg h-10 transition-all

tables.style: Compact density. Header: uppercase text-xs text-muted-foreground. Rows: hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors border-b border-border/50

modals.content: bg-card border border-border shadow-2xl rounded-xl p-6 max-w-lg w-full

visual_enhancers.gradients: Use subtle radial gradients for 'spotlight' effects behind charts.

logo_placeholder.concept: Hexagon with BrainCircuit or Sparkles inside

universal_guidelines: Always check contrast ratios. The Navy Blue background requires pure white or very light grey text.
Do not use generic 'card' layouts. Use the 'Tech Borders' style defined in components.
Use data-testid attributes for all interactive elements.
Animations must be purposeful (e.g., charts growing, numbers counting up). Avoid random motion.
Toast notifications (Sonner) must be used for all CRUD success/error states.
Dark mode is mandatory for this app. Do not implement a light mode toggle unless explicitly asked.

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Setup the Theme Provider (if not present) to force dark mode or handle system preference.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Update tailwind.config.js with the custom colors defined in 'colors' section.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Create a 'Layout' component that includes the Sidebar and Topbar.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Implement the Dashboard page using the Bento Grid strategy.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Build the Reusable Components (StatCard, DataTable, ModalForm).
instructions_to_main_agent.step_6: Implement the specialized hooks (useIndependenceScore, etc.) in a /hooks directory.
